overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a player character walking through shallow coastal waters and along a rocky desert shoreline. The scene features ancient Egyptian coastal scenery with wooden palisades, shipwrecks, and sailing vessels under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal water with rocky outcrop

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow clear water toward a rocky shoreline with a large rock formation ahead

entered.detail: massive tan rock outcrop rising from the water
clear shallow water with visible sandy bottom and gentle waves
hazy mountain range visible across the water on the horizon
broken wooden pier structure with posts sticking out of the water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in shallow coastal water with clear visibility of the sandy bottom. A massive rock formation dominates the center view while a broken wooden dock structure is visible in the distance. The camera moves steadily forward through the water toward the shore.

events.description: exits shallow water onto rocky beach terrain

agents.ego_description: walking onto the rocky shore and approaching a wooden fence line on the left

entered.detail: tall wooden stake fence running parallel to the shoreline
uneven rocky ground with scattered stones and pebbles

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from water to rocky beach terrain, leaving the ocean behind. A tall wooden palisade fence appears on the left, running parallel to the path. The large rock formation moves to the left background as the camera approaches the wooden shipwreck structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path along wooden fence with cliff wall

events.description: bright sun creates lens flare through gaps in the wooden fence

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow path between the wooden fence and rocky cliff wall, with the sun flaring through the fence slats

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face forming the right boundary of the path
bright sunlight streaming through the wooden fence creating a lens flare effect

segments.scene_description: The path narrows between the wooden palisade on the left and a rocky cliff wall on the right. The sun shines brightly through the fence gaps creating a strong lens flare. The terrain becomes a dirt trail as the camera continues forward before turning slightly away from the fence.

events.description: exits the fenced pathway onto open coastal trail with ocean view

agents.ego_description: walking along the open rocky coastline with the ocean on the right, approaching a large shipwreck structure

entered.detail: large boulders and rocky outcrops along the shoreline
ancient structures and buildings visible on the distant cliffs

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the fenced pathway onto a wide-open rocky coastline with full sky visibility. The ocean returns to view on the right while the wooden shipwreck structure grows larger as the camera approaches. Distant cliff-side settlements become visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shore with shipwreck and sailing vessel

events.description: sailing ship with tan sail comes into view on the water to the right

agents.ego_description: walking past the shipwreck remains along the rocky shore as a sailboat appears in the water

entered.detail: wooden sailing vessel with large tan sail navigating the coastal waters

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the rocky shore, passing close by the weathered wooden shipwreck structure. A sailing ship with a large tan sail enters the frame from the right, moving along the coast. The terrain remains rocky and uneven as the path continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shallow coastal waters onto a rugged, sun-drenched desert shoreline. It begins by wading through clear water toward a massive rock formation and a distant broken dock, before transitioning onto a rocky beach where a tall wooden palisade fence appears on the left. As the path narrows into a dirt trail between the fence and a rocky cliff, bright sunlight pierces through the gaps to create a strong lens flare. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from the fenced corridor onto a wide coastline, revealing the ocean to the right and distant cliff-side settlements. Finally, the camera passes a weathered wooden shipwreck as a sailing ship with a large tan sail glides into view along the uneven rocky shore.
